steps.name: Given Cloud Agent is connected to Edge Agent
Cloud Agent create a connection using identus cloud-agent api
Edge Agent parses an OOB invitation using edge-agent sdk
Cloud Agent waits until connection state to be ConnectionResponseSent using identus cloud-agent api
Given Edge Agent has '1' anonymous credentials issued by Cloud Agent
